summary: Replayed ADR 0313 from the refreshed exact-main candidate after `origin/main` advanced to repository version `0.177.138`, cut repository version `0.177.139` on top of platform version `0.130.86`, converged the interactive ops portal on `docker-runtime-lv3`, republished the generated docs and changelog portals through `nginx-lv3`, and re-verified the shared contextual-help, glossary, and escalation drawer across the interactive runtime, generated artifacts, and public auth-gated edges.

verification.check: Release readiness and refreshed exact-main cut
verification.observed: `scripts/release_manager.py --status-json` confirmed the release blockers needed for the exact-main replay were satisfied on top of repository version `0.177.138`, `--dry-run` found the single ADR 0313 unreleased note, and `--bump patch --released-on 2026-04-02` prepared repository version `0.177.139` for the refreshed replay.

The first rebased test run preserved a truthful tooling failure in `2026-04-02-ws-0313-mainline-targeted-tests-r3.txt` because the docs-only UV environment no longer provided `fastapi`; rerunning the same slice with `requirements/ops-portal.txt` added returned `56 passed in 60.20s` in `2026-04-02-ws-0313-mainline-targeted-tests-r4.txt`.
`make syntax-check-ops-portal` passed from the rebased `codex/ws-0313-main-integration` tree.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=ops_portal env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true -e ops_portal_repo_root=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0313-live-apply'` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=189 changed=14 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36`, and the follow-on restic trigger wrote `receipts/restic-backups/20260402T024215Z.json`.

A final ad hoc verification through the repo-managed Proxmox jump path showed the `ops-portal` container healthy on `docker-runtime-lv3`, `/health` returning `{"status":"ok"}`, and the live root page still exposing `Contextual Help`, `Escalation Path`, `Live apply`, `Runtime Assurance`, and `Application Launcher`.

`make deploy-docs-portal` rebuilt the docs portal with Pagefind, refreshed the generated changelog and docs artifacts, and completed the shared edge publication with final recap `nginx-lv3 : ok=88 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=18`.

verification.check: Published artifact parity and public auth-gated edges
verification.observed: The final public verification showed the generated docs and changelog portal markers still present locally and on `nginx-lv3`, the deployed `docs-portal/index.html` and `changelog-portal/index.html` digests matching the local build outputs exactly, and unauthenticated requests to `https://ops.lv3.org/`, `https://docs.lv3.org/`, and `https://changelog.lv3.org/` all returning `302` to `/oauth2/sign_in` with `X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow`.

The final exact-main tree passed `scripts/generate_adr_index.py --write`, `scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, `scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, `scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, and `git diff --check`. Earlier correction-loop evidence is intentionally preserved: `validate-r1` failed only because the ADR 0230 policy toolchain could not install OPA with the controller disk at `128MiB` free, `validate-r2` then failed because `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md` was stale, and `workstream-surfaces-r1` failed before repo-local scratch files were removed and the restic/SBOM outputs were declared in `workstreams.yaml`.

notes: This exact-main receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local ADR 0313 receipt as the canonical proof for repository version `0.177.139` and platform version `0.130.87`.

The first exact-main replay that started before the rebase is intentionally excluded from canonical truth because `origin/main` advanced to repository version `0.177.138` while it was running; those provisional artifacts were stashed before the refreshed replay.

The refreshed replay preserved the branch-local recovery fixes that ADR 0313 exposed on the latest lineage: Docker bridge chains can disappear after nftables evaluation on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and the mirrored ops-portal runtime tree must not import `platform.datetime_compat` from the repo-only package layout.

correction_loop.surface: exact-main release cut, guest-runtime verification, and public portal verification
correction_loop.repair_action: Stashed the provisional stale-main artifacts when `origin/main` advanced, rebased onto the refreshed mainline baseline, recut repository version `0.177.139`, reran the exact-main live apply, reran the focused tests with `requirements/ops-portal.txt` added to the UV environment, switched guest verification to the repo-managed Ansible jump path, reran the public verification after fixing the `X-Robots-Tag` parser false negative that appeared in the first `r1` transcript, freed controller disk space by pruning the oversized `uv` cache when ADR 0230 policy validation could not install OPA, refreshed the generated dependency graph after `validate-r2` exposed that stale surface, and reran the repo validation lanes until the local, remote, and pre-push bundles all passed.
correction_loop.verification: The refreshed exact-main replay passed, the interactive runtime stayed healthy with the expected drawer markers, the deployed docs and changelog digests matched the local artifacts on `nginx-lv3`, the public ops/docs/changelog portals all redirected to `/oauth2/sign_in` with `noindex, nofollow` headers, and the final `validate`, `remote-validate`, and `pre-push-gate` runs all completed successfully on the repaired tree.
